text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For ordinary Umamusume, summer camp is a time
to improve their skills. But...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon, as usual, smiles with anticipation
at the mountain of experiments that can only be
done at this time of year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And thus begins our whirlwind of a summer camp!
